headline: Healthpeak Properties Declares Monthly Common Stock Cash Dividends for the Second Quarter of 2026
summary: DENVER, April 06, 2026--Healthpeak Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DOC), a leading owner, operator, and developer of real estate for healthcare discovery and delivery, announced that on April 6, 2026, its Board of Directors declared a monthly common stock cash dividend of $0.10167 per share for the second quarter of 2026, payable on the payment dates set forth in the table below to stockholders of record as of the close of business on the corresponding record date in the table below. headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Healthpeak Properties, Lowers Price Target to $19
summary: Baird  analyst Amanda Sweitzer   maintains Healthpeak Properties (NYSE:DOC) with a Outperform and lowers the price target from $20 to $19.
